lines.italian: A Verona ci sono due famiglie.
lines.english: In Verona there are two families.
The Montagues and the Capulets.
The two families hate each other.
Romeo is a Montague.
He is a young man.
Juliet is a Capulet.
She is a beautiful girl.

lines.italian: Una sera, c'è una festa a casa Capuleti.
lines.english: One evening, there is a party at the Capulet house.
Romeo goes to the party.

lines.italian: Non deve andare. È un Montecchi.
lines.english: He must not go. He is a Montague.
But he goes anyway.
At the party, Romeo sees Juliet.
"Who is that girl?" asks Romeo.

lines.italian: "È la figlia dei Capuleti," dice il suo amico.
lines.english: "She is the daughter of the Capulets," says his friend.
Romeo does not listen.

lines.italian: Va da Giulietta e le parla.
lines.english: He goes to Juliet and speaks to her.
They look into each other's eyes.
It is love.

lines.italian: Quella notte, Romeo va sotto il balcone di Giulietta.
lines.english: That night, Romeo goes under Juliet's balcony.
Juliet is on the balcony.

lines.italian: Guarda le stelle e pensa a Romeo.
lines.english: She looks at the stars and thinks of Romeo.

lines.italian: "Oh Romeo, Romeo! Perché sei un Montecchi?"
lines.english: "Oh Romeo, Romeo! Why are you a Montague?"

lines.italian: "Una rosa con un altro nome è sempre dolce."
lines.english: "A rose by any other name is still sweet."
Romeo says: "I love you, Juliet."
Juliet says: "I love you, Romeo."

lines.italian: "Ma le nostre famiglie si odiano," dice Giulietta.
lines.english: "But our families hate each other," says Juliet.

lines.italian: "Non importa," dice Romeo. "Il nostro amore è più forte."
lines.english: "It doesn't matter," says Romeo. "Our love is stronger."

lines.italian: Il giorno dopo, vanno da Frate Lorenzo.
lines.english: The next day, they go to Friar Lawrence.

lines.italian: Frate Lorenzo li sposa in segreto.
lines.english: Friar Lawrence marries them in secret.
But then everything goes wrong.
There is a fight in the street.
Romeo's friend dies.
Romeo is very angry.
Romeo kills a Capulet.

lines.italian: Il principe dice: "Romeo deve andare via da Verona!"
lines.english: The prince says: "Romeo must leave Verona!"
Romeo leaves. Juliet cries.

lines.italian: Il padre di Giulietta dice: "Devi sposare un altro uomo."
lines.english: Juliet's father says: "You must marry another man."
Juliet says: "No! Never!"
Friar Lawrence has a plan.

lines.italian: "Bevi questa medicina. Dormirai per due giorni."
lines.english: "Drink this medicine. You will sleep for two days."

lines.italian: "Tutti pensano che sei morta. Romeo viene e vi svegliate insieme."
lines.english: "Everyone thinks you are dead. Romeo comes and you wake up together."
Juliet drinks the medicine.
She falls asleep. She looks dead.
The family cries.

lines.italian: Ma Romeo non riceve il messaggio del piano.
lines.english: But Romeo does not receive the message about the plan.

lines.italian: Romeo sente che Giulietta è morta.
lines.english: Romeo hears that Juliet is dead.
"No! My Juliet!" shouts Romeo.
Romeo returns to Verona.
He goes to where Juliet sleeps.
He thinks she is dead.

lines.italian: "Non posso vivere senza di te," dice Romeo.
lines.english: "I cannot live without you," says Romeo.
Romeo drinks the poison. He dies.
Juliet wakes up.
She sees Romeo dead.
"No, no, no!" shouts Juliet.
Juliet dies with Romeo.
The two families arrive.
They see the two dead young people.
They cry together.

lines.italian: I Montecchi e i Capuleti fanno pace.
lines.english: The Montagues and the Capulets make peace.

lines.italian: Ma il prezzo è troppo alto.
lines.english: But the price is too high.

lines.italian: L'amore di Romeo e Giulietta vive per sempre.
lines.english: The love of Romeo and Juliet lives forever.
